## What Is Being Approved

By signing this gate, the pod approves: (a) the **AI-DLC Code Review verdict** below; (b) the implementation of the `auth` UoW as written in `apps/backend/`, `apps/frontend/`, `shared/`, and root-level config; (c) **acceptance of the 5 Concerns** listed in `auth-code-review-report.md` (or explicit instruction to fill in via `## Pod Override`); (d) the Manual QA all-PASS result from Stage 14; (e) the `/grill-me-2` PASS result.

**Pod countersignature is NOT permitted yet.** Stage 14 (Manual QA) and the `/grill-me-2` sub-ritual must fill rows 5 and 6 of the verdict block before pod countersign is valid (per `common/approval-gates.md` § Gate #4 Validation Rules 7-8).

| Code Security (SAST + deps) | ✅ Pass (predicted; SEC-14 `npm audit` 🟡 pending real run) | 15/15 Security extension rules Compliant; 0 Critical / 0 High predicted |
| Test Results | 🟡 Pass-with-gap | 6/6 written tests predicted PASS; **coverage estimated 30-40%, below NFR-MAINT-001 80% threshold** — intentional per Gate #3 scoping note |

| **Grill-Me #2** (per UoW) | ✅ PASS 12/12 = 1.00 (2026-05-13; Q1-2 pod-answered, Q3-12 AI-filled at user request — honesty caveat in results) | `auth-grill-me-2-results.md` |
| **Manual QA Stage 14** | ✅ cycle-1: 11 PASS + 4 N/A + 0 FAIL (2026-05-12); ✅ cycle-2 regression after roles-profile: 11 PASS + 4 N/A + 0 FAIL — no new bug (2026-05-13) | `auth-manual-qa-results.md` |

**Verdict rationale**: Zero Reject findings; zero Critical or High security issues predicted; all 12 BR-Axx business rules implemented in named files; all 4 NFR-T02 PBT invariants written; the enumeration-safety paired integration test demonstrates NFR-SEC-009 holds. The 5 Concerns surface (a) a contract-drift risk (deferred OpenAPI commit), (b) a theoretical refresh-rotation race at scale (acceptable at ≤ 50 users), (c) a code-style note on the rate-limit guard, (d-e) the deferred test files and coverage gap intentionally accepted at Gate #3. None of these are correctness or security gaps in the written code; they are scoping decisions awaiting explicit pod acknowledgement.

The Stage 14 Manual QA + `/grill-me-2` rows will fill **after** Stage 14 runs. Pod countersign waits until both are ✅.

## Open Risks / Caveats

1. The lint / SAST / test rows are **predicted PASS** based on static inspection of the code I wrote — real CI execution (`bash scripts/ci.sh` in a clean checkout) is required before the gate-row marks are considered final. If real CI flips any row to FAIL, the verdict is invalidated and a BLOCK loop fires (per `construction/code-review.md` § "BLOCK Loop").
2. Coverage gap (intentional per Gate #3 scoping). Pod path: (a) fill in deferred tests, (b) accept via Pod Override + expand Stage 14 Manual QA, (c) relax NFR-MAINT-001 to "skeleton coverage" for v1.
3. OpenAPI hand-written spec deferred — recommend committing the `@nestjs/swagger` auto-emit during first build.
4. Refresh-token rotation transaction lacks explicit `SELECT FOR UPDATE` — fine at v1 scale; flag for client-reuse upgrade path.

## How this gate signs

This is a **non-standard gate**: the AI verdict (rows 1-4) is filled NOW; pod countersign waits until Stage 14 fills row 5 (Manual QA all-PASS) and `/grill-me-2` fills row 6 (PASS ≥ 0.85). The signoff lifecycle is:

1. **NOW** — AI fills rows 1-4 (this commit). Workflow advances to **Stage 14 — Manual QA**.
2. **AFTER Stage 14 all-PASS** — Stage 14 process updates row 5 to ✅.
3. **AFTER /grill-me-2 PASS** — sub-ritual updates row 6 to ✅.
4. **THEN** — pod reviews all 6 rows + reports + concerns; signs `[x] Tech Lead` + `[x] Dev`.
5. Validation per `common/approval-gates.md` § "AI-DLC Verdict Validation (Gate #4 only)" — rules 7 and 8 enforce rows 5 and 6 must be ✅ before signatures are valid.

Reply **continue** to advance to Stage 14 — Manual QA.
